title: NOW TV/ 網上行sales請出招

replies.msg:

My elder brother who’s a salesman at NOW feels he’s made the wrong career choice. I told him “why not wipe the slate clean and start over in a different career?” His friend Tony too suggested him to study a different degree course and start with a clean slate. He blames his bad career decision on Tony. I said to him “Let’s just wipe the slate clean. It’s over.” He blames Tony for convincing him to be a salesman 👨🏻‍💼 That’s the way the cookie crumbles.
